title: Maintain quality processes in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain quality processes in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Conduct quality check of completed work

pcs.text: Completed work is checked for compliance with workplace procedures and manufacturer, supplier or customer specifications according to size and importance of job1.2 Quality inspection documentation is completed according to workplace procedures1.3 Documents relating to outcomes of quality checks are kept according to workplace procedures or quality system requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Completed work is checked for compliance with workplace procedures and manufacturer, supplier or customer specifications according to size and importance of job1.2 Quality inspection documentation is completed according to workplace procedures1.3 Documents relating to outcomes of quality checks are kept according to workplace procedures or quality system requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Completed work is checked for compliance with workplace procedures and manufacturer, supplier or customer specifications according to size and importance of job1.2 Quality inspection documentation is completed according to workplace procedures1.3 Documents relating to outcomes of quality checks are kept according to workplace procedures or quality system requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Conduct quality check of completed work

elements.title: Report on the quality of work outcomes and processes

pcs.text: Outcomes of quality checks are assessed against workplace performance indicators2.2 Problems relating to quality of outcomes and processes are identified and documented according to workplace procedures2.3 Information relating to quality of work outcomes and processes is provided to appropriate persons on a regular basis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Outcomes of quality checks are assessed against workplace performance indicators2.2 Problems relating to quality of outcomes and processes are identified and documented according to workplace procedures2.3 Information relating to quality of work outcomes and processes is provided to appropriate persons on a regular basis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Outcomes of quality checks are assessed against workplace performance indicators2.2 Problems relating to quality of outcomes and processes are identified and documented according to workplace procedures2.3 Information relating to quality of work outcomes and processes is provided to appropriate persons on a regular basis.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Report on the quality of work outcomes and processes

elements.title: Generate improvements to work outcomes and processes

pcs.text: Staff are encouraged to contribute ideas and possible solutions to address identified quality issues3.2 Options for solving quality issues are generated and benefits of each option evaluated3.3 Recommended solutions to quality issues are discussed with and reported to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Staff are encouraged to contribute ideas and possible solutions to address identified quality issues3.2 Options for solving quality issues are generated and benefits of each option evaluated3.3 Recommended solutions to quality issues are discussed with and reported to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Staff are encouraged to contribute ideas and possible solutions to address identified quality issues3.2 Options for solving quality issues are generated and benefits of each option evaluated3.3 Recommended solutions to quality issues are discussed with and reported to supervisor.
